regression_name: Purchase return precision comparison rejects legitimate full returns
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
fixed_by_subject: fix: close purchase-return precision and mixed cashflow allocation regressions
impact_summary: Can block valid returns and leave AP/outstanding mismatched
notes: Validation compares currency-rounded amounts; replay and outstanding updates also currency-normalized.

regression_name: Cash-flow mixed journal entry assigned to single section (winner-take-all)
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
fixed_by_subject: fix: close purchase-return precision and mixed cashflow allocation regressions
impact_summary: Misstates section-level cash flow (operating/investing/financing) under mixed counterparty lines
notes: Cash deltas are now apportioned by section weights with rounding remainder to dominant section.

regression_name: Orchestrator idempotency persisted SUCCESS before outer transaction durability
introduced_by_subject: fix: persist orchestrator idempotency status transitions
fixed_by_subject: fix: make idempotency success and reversal audits commit-safe
impact_summary: False SUCCESS could skip valid retries after rollback of real business work
notes: SUCCESS now persists after commit; rollback marks command FAILED with rollback reason. Revalidated at HEAD on 2026-02-09 against review comment.

regression_name: Cascade reversal could emit success audit despite transaction rollback
introduced_by_subject: fix: make cascade journal reversal fail closed
fixed_by_subject: fix: make idempotency success and reversal audits commit-safe
impact_summary: Incorrect audit trail could claim reversal success while data rolled back
notes: Success audit is now registered for afterCommit only; no success log on rollback paths.

regression_name: Credit-note idempotency compares requested amount to total credits (AR+discount)
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D3: return + credit idempotency
impact_summary: Legitimate idempotent credit-note retries for discounted invoices can be rejected with CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT
notes: Validation currently uses aggregate credit total; should compare requested amount against AR credit line for replay equivalence. Existing idempotency test passes but does not cover discounted invoice replay.

regression_name: Dealer settlement concurrent no-reference retry can fail idempotency with conflict
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D2: dealer settlement idempotency reserve-first
impact_summary: Concurrent duplicate settlement calls with server-generated references can return CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT instead of replaying the original settlement
notes: Reference is generated before idempotency reservation, so competing requests with the same key can reserve mismatched canonical references.

regression_name: Dealer settlement replay can return before canonical reference mapping is linked
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D2: dealer settlement idempotency reserve-first
impact_summary: Pre-reserve historical settlements can keep stale key-to-reference mappings, causing false conflicts and unnecessary idempotency wait paths
notes: Existing-allocation replay exits before `linkReferenceMapping`, so historical rows without mapping can retain generated references that do not match the persisted journal.

regression_name: Dealer receipt reference reuse with new idempotency key appends duplicate settlement allocations
introduced_by_subject: CODE-RED Block D1: dealer receipt idempotency reserve-first
impact_summary: Reused journal reference with different key can overstate settlement activity by inserting duplicate PartnerSettlementAllocation rows while invoice balances stay unchanged
notes: createJournalEntry returns existing journal by reference; recordDealerReceipt and recordDealerReceiptSplit only short-circuit by idempotency key and can still insert new allocation rows.

regression_name: Legacy dispatch movements with NULL packing_slip_id cannot be relinked after slip-scoped query
impact_summary: Idempotent dispatch replay can leave pre-migration movements unlinked to COGS journals, breaking movement-to-journal traceability
notes: Migration adds packing_slip_id but does not backfill legacy rows; slip-scoped lookup excludes NULL rows.

regression_name: Closed-period temporal balance snapshot math ignores account natural side
introduced_by_subject: feat: period-end snapshots for closed-period reports
impact_summary: Credit-normal accounts can be sign-flipped in closed-period as-of balances, distorting trial balance and financial reports
notes: Snapshot lines are converted with debit-credit unconditionally; liabilities/equity/revenue require credit-debit.

regression_name: Dispatch command validates postingAmount after idempotency reservation
impact_summary: Invalid dispatch request can poison idempotency key as IN_PROGRESS and block valid retries
notes: Validation throws before guarded try/catch, so markFailed is not executed for this path.

regression_name: Payroll command validates postingAmount after idempotency reservation
impact_summary: Invalid payroll request can poison idempotency key as IN_PROGRESS and block valid retries
notes: Same ordering bug as dispatch path: reservation occurs before validation and outside failure-handling block.

regression_name: Purchase return outstanding guard blocks valid supplier credit after full payment
introduced_by_subject: fix: close remaining P1 predeploy blockers
impact_summary: Post-payment returns cannot be recorded as supplier credits, forcing manual adjustments and workflow breaks
notes: Guard enforces returnAmount<=outstandingAmount, which rejects legitimate returns when outstanding is zero after settlement.
